EmailTemplate.name: AN - Job board application confirmation
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you, we've received your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THANK YOU, WE'VE RECEIVED YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thanks for applying for the {!TR1__Job_Role__c.TR1__Role__c} role. We are looking forward to reviewing your application.
You will soon receive an invite to start building your Alliance Profile. If you already have one, you will only be asked to add details specific to this role.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
